evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of having no permanent event type clutter. However, the evidence provided in the linked use case only demonstrates the creation of a temporary booking link for a one-off meeting, which does not directly address the prevention of permanent event types. The absence of any checks or mechanisms to ensure that permanent event types are not created indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of mechanisms to prevent the creation of permanent event types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
